items.title: SIXR to represent Bangladesh in Hua Hin Cricket Sixes
items.summary: SIXR Cricket Club will represent Bangladesh in the upcoming Hua Hin Cricket Sixes in Thailand, with the six-a-side tournament scheduled to take place from June 29 to July 4 at the Alan Cooke Ground.

items.title: Nayeem Hasan appeals for privacy following police assault
items.summary: The Bangladesh off-spinner appeared visibly shaken and requested privacy as the BCB stepped in to provide support following the alleged incident.

items.title: Soumya: 'There should have been a much bigger celebration after series win'
items.summary: Bangladesh team reportedly didn't celebrate much after winning the second ODI

items.title: Bangladesh aim for 3-0 against Australia in ODI series
items.summary: Weather remains a big concern for Sunday's ODI in Mirpur

items.title: Labuschagne looking to salvage pride in dead rubber
items.summary: Australia batter Marnus Labuschagne on Saturday said his side would be eager to avoid a whitewash when they take on Bangladesh in the third and final ODI at the Sher-e-Bangla National Cricket Stadium tomorrow.

items.title: Labuschagne lauds Bangladesh's impressive rise ahead of final ODI
items.summary: Bangladesh have already won the three-match series 2-0

items.title: Soumya unfazed by criticism of reverse-sweep dismissal
items.summary: The opener said he would continue backing his strengths and praised improved communication from the team management

items.title: To become a big team, success in ICC events is a must: Soumya
items.summary: Even pacer Mustafizur Rahman, known to be a man of few words, pointed out the team's shortcomings and urged his teammates to strive towards becoming a truly big team. Opener Soumya Sarkar echoed those sentiments during a press conference at the Sher-e-Bangla National Stadium in Mirpur today ahead of Sunday's final ODI.

items.title: Nayeem Hasan allegedly assaulted by policemen in Chattogram
items.summary: The auto-rickshaw Nayeem Hasan was returning home from the airport in was stopped by law-enforcement officials, who proceeded to physically assault the cricketer

items.title: BCB, CWAB and cricketers condemn harassment of Nayeem, demand action
items.summary: The Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB), the Cricketers' Welfare Association of Bangladesh (CWAB) and several national cricketers on Saturday condemned the alleged physical assault and harassment of Bangladesh spinner Nayeem Hasan by police personnel in Chattogram, calling for a thorough investigation and action against those responsible.

items.title: ‘We are coming at people’: Pacers lead the charge in pack mentality
items.summary: Imagine Mustafizur Rahman giving a dressing room speech and asking for improvement, not just from the batters but also in their overall mentality. That is exactly what happened in the Bangladesh dressing room after sealing their maiden series win against Australia on Thursday.

items.title: Mehidy taken to hospital after being hit on the head by bouncer
items.summary: Mehidy had a concussion, the team physio said, and will remain in hospital for 24 hours

items.title: Miraz released from hospital as Tigers stay unchanged for 3rd Australia ODI
items.summary: Miraz was hit on the helmet by a bouncer in the second ODI against Australia

items.title: Taskin, Mustafizur set up famous series win for Bangladesh
items.summary: Australia crashed to 0 for 3 and despite a century stand from Labuschagne and Bartlett, the home side came out comfortable winners

items.title: India-born Nikhil Chaudhary called into Australia T20I squad
items.summary: Former Punjab allrounder Chaudhary replaces Travis Head for Bangladesh T20Is after three excellent seasons with Hurricanes in the BBL

items.title: Taskin and Rana return for T20Is against Australia
items.summary: Towhid Hridoy and the uncapped fast-bowling allrounder Robiul Haque have been brought into the side for the one-off Test against Zimbabwe

items.title: Australia change NZ and Bangladesh schedules due to women's Champions Trophy
items.summary: New Zealand to tour twice in October and March due to February Champions Trophy while Bangladesh T20Is have been scrapped

items.title: Australia seek response as Bangladesh close in on landmark series win
items.summary: Confident hosts will hope for another complete performance as they eye a maiden ODI series win against Australia

items.title: Ireland beat Bangladesh; Scotland thump Pakistan; NZ ace 184 chase vs SA
items.summary: Canning and Maguire starred for Ireland, while Bryce's 43-ball 94 took Scotland to a DLS win

items.title: 'My best match at this level' - Mosaddek revels in successful Bangladesh comeback
items.summary: In his first international appearance since November 2022, he scored 86* and picked up two wickets as Bangladesh beat Australia for only the second time in ODIs

items.title: Rana and Mosaddek star as Bangladesh end 21-year wait with crushing win
items.summary: Australia dropped four catches then lost early wickets in the chase before Nahid Rana's pace did the damage

items.title: Australia bowl first in series opener, hand Liam Scott debut
items.summary: Mosaddek Hossain returns to the side after a gap of nearly four years as Bangladesh look to extend a strong home record
